xcancel_trump_iran.content: MACRO ALERT: US Gas tops $4/gallon, Brent crude $100/bbl (+27%), jet fuel +96%, Hormuz paralyzed. IEA warns oil could hit $150/bbl. 1970s-style oil shock.

xcancel_trump_iran.author: Eyal Yakoby
xcancel_trump_iran.content: BREAKING: Trump reiterates he's always opposed nuclear Iran, vows never to allow Iran a nuclear weapon since 2015 campaign

xcancel_trump_iran.author: @testicular74211
xcancel_trump_iran.content: Trump: We don't need to be in the Middle East. We are just helping out

kobeissi_letter.content: US intelligence: Iran not willing to engage in substantial negotiations. Tehran believes it is in a strong position.
Inflation expectations spike: US consumer inflation expectations +0.7pp in March to 6.2%, highest since Aug 2025. Largest increase since April 2025 Liberation Day tariffs.
Iran says no talks through mediators for temporary ceasefire. Trump said Iran President asked for ceasefire.
IRGC charging $1/barrel toll on Hormuz ships, paid in Chinese yuan or stablecoins. Ships must provide ownership, flag, cargo manifest, crew list to IRGC Navy.
Asia 45% of crude/condensate imports via Hormuz (highest dependency). Africa 41% jet fuel via Hormuz. Closure is biggest energy supply shock in history.

BREAKING (POLITICO): Tonight 9PM ET Trump will declare Iran War 'winding down', claim 'all military objectives met'. Scapegoat NATO for Hormuz closure. Little evidence US-Iran anywhere close to agreement.
Iran President Pezeshkian releases open letter to American people: Iran harbors no enmity, recent US actions are aggression targeting civilians, path of confrontation is futile.
Trump threatened to stop weapons to Ukraine to pressure NATO reopen Hormuz (per FT). France, Germany, UK issued statement expressing readiness to contribute to safe Hormuz passage.
Amazon cloud infrastructure in Bahrain damaged following Iranian strike (per Reuters).
US lost 16 MQ-9 Reaper drones since Feb 28, worth ~$500M (per CBS).
Gold futures surge above $4,800/oz, up $720/oz since March 23 low. $3 trillion market cap added since Wednesday.
NYSE Tick Index spiked to 2,329, highest on record. Nearly every stock rising. S&P 500 had most aggressive buying in years.
US-Iran discussing ceasefire + Hormuz reopening deal. China and Pakistan presented peace initiative. Iran's FM called ceasefire claim 'false and baseless'.
Iran's Speaker: Out-of-context quotes + manufactured FOMO = War profiteering 101.
Iran's Foreign Ministry: Trump's ceasefire claim is 'false and baseless'.

watcher_guru.content: Iran demands ships in Strait of Hormuz pay fees in crypto or Chinese yuan (Bloomberg).
NASA officially launches Artemis II rocket, first crewed Moon mission since 1972.
Solana-based crypto DEX Drift Protocol $270M hack - 'not an April Fools joke'.
71% chance Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire this year.
Binance officially launches oil and natural gas futures trading.
Trump: US will not have anything to do with Strait of Hormuz, will withdraw within 2-3 weeks.
S&P 500 rises 2.5% after Iranian President Pezeshkian says ready to end war but wants guarantees.

zerohedge.content: Watch Live: President Trump Addresses The Nation About Iran (Live coverage of 9PM ET address)
Madness At The Grocery Store (inflation article)
He Ran On No Wars - Now We Have One: Michael Savage Breaks With Trump Over Iran
Dubai Crackdown Hits Iran's Economic Lifeline, Squeezes IRGC Networks
Gold/silver on verge of bull market after early March plunge.
Expect Electricity Prices To Rise Further, Analysts Warn
TRUMP discussed firing Attorney General Bondi, floated replacing with EPA chief Zeldin (NYT)
Pentagon Prepares A-10 Warthog Surge As Mideast Fleet Set To Double
The Actual Problem With America's Energy Security Is Starting To Reveal Itself
US nat gas at 6-month low: Henry Hub $2.819/mBtu, lowest since September. While rest of world worries about Iran war energy costs, American gas consumers enjoy a bonanza.

news.headline: Watch Live: Trump Gives Updates on Iran War in Address to Nation
news.content: Trump increasingly telegraphing wind-down; Iran not currently willing to engage in serious negotiations.

news.headline: Trump Seeks War Off-Ramp, Floats More Attacks to Press Iran
news.content: Trump dispatching JD Vance to deliver ultimatum to Tehran: make deal or face attacks on key infrastructure. Per Bloomberg.

news.headline: Trump Presses Allies on Iran as Frustration Grows Over Prolonged Conflict
news.content: Trump foresees ending war within 2-3 weeks. US largely accomplished military goals. Will leave resolution of Strait of Hormuz to other nations.

news.headline: Oil price falls and markets rally after Trump says Iran war over in 'two to three weeks'
news.content: S&P 500 rose 2.9% at open on Tuesday, closed +0.72% higher. Oil prices also rose initially on $100/bbl, then fell after Trump indicated wind-down.

news.headline: Oil prices fall to around $100 after Trump indicates war could end in weeks
news.content: Oil dropped after Trump said he expects US to wind down operations in 2-3 weeks and appeared to be declaring victory.

news.headline: Day 32 of Middle East conflict — Iran threatens US tech companies, Kuwaiti oil tanker attacked
news.content: Iran FM Araghchi: Iran not in negotiations with US, though messages exchanged via mediators. Kuwaiti oil tanker attacked.

news.headline: Trump says Iran war could wrap up in 2-3 weeks as conflict pushes gas prices over $4 a gallon
news.content: US gas crossed $4/gallon average (first since Aug 2022). Trump said war coming to an end, may abandon efforts to force Hormuz reopen.

news.headline: Trump to give primetime address on Iran war as questions swirl over his next move
news.content: Trump's messaging shifted from 'unconditional surrender' to '2-3 weeks end' to claiming Iran asked for ceasefire (denied). Truth Social: promised to 'blast Iran into oblivion' if no Hormuz reopening.
